entities.name: VCs
entities.context: Venture capitalists who want to leverage talent data across their portfolio companies

entities.name: talent board
entities.context: Interface concept for VCs; the real value is the underlying proprietary database, not the board itself

entities.name: proprietary talent database
entities.context: The actual valuable asset VCs want to own and leverage across portfolio

entities.name: Getro
entities.context: Current talent board tool that retains ownership of VC talent data

entities.name: data ownership wedge
entities.context: Problem where tools like Getro create separation between VCs and their own talent asset

relationships.context: VCs want to leverage this database across their portfolio
Current tool VCs use for talent boards
Getro keeps/controls the talent data rather than the VC owning it
The board is a surface; the database is the real asset
Getro creates separation between VCs and their talent data asset
